title: New top local AI image generator is here! Already uncensored
summary: Krea 2 is a new open-source, uncensored AI image generator available for local use. It can be integrated into ComfyUI, supports LoRA fine-tuning, and includes tools for model rebalancing and conditioning control. The video provides installation, usage, and workflow guidance.
writeup: The video introduces Krea 2, an open-source, uncensored AI image generator that runs locally. It covers integration with ComfyUI, LoRA fine-tuning, and tools for model rebalancing and conditioning control. Installation steps, usage, and workflow guidance are included.
